key_evidence: 33.7M require humanitarian assistance — the largest single-country caseload globally
IPC Phase 5 famine confirmed in El Fasher (North Darfur) and Kadugli (South Kordofan) since Sept 2025
20M in acute hunger; 800,000 children at risk of severe malnutrition; 9M displaced; 40% of health facilities non-functioning
Crisis 'much worse than acknowledged' (Al Jazeera May 12); marginalized in the global system (Stimson)
SAF-RSF civil war in its fourth year; both belligerents documented agents of mass civilian harm
methodology_note: Floor confirmation at 0.0. Pattern-continuation; no discrete new state-decision scoring event. No composite movement.
